indicators.name: GDP Growth
indicators.label: Monthly GDP
indicators.what_it_means: Broadest measure of economic activity. GDP growth = more freight moving.

indicators.name: Fuel Cost
indicators.label: Diesel vs baseline
indicators.what_it_means: Fuel is typically 25-35% of operating costs. Above baseline = margin pressure.

indicators.name: CAD Impact
indicators.label: USD/CAD vs 1.35 baseline
indicators.what_it_means: Weaker CAD = more competitive cross-border exports, higher input costs. Stronger CAD = cheaper US equipment/parts.

rates_snapshot.note: Rate data from DAT/Loadlink requires paid subscription. These are operating cost indicators that drive rate floors.

note: Public data from Statistics Canada, Bank of Canada, and industry surveys.
